This example ends here. Next section is a rare example of
BT determination method (not a BT rectification method)
based on time of intercourse, available to us from Bhattolpala.
I think this rare and unique information would be of interest
to some.

Time of Intercourse and an
Example for BT
by
dete~mination ~hattolpala
I was just reading through the commentary of Bhattolpala
on Brihat Jataka. Suddenly a unique example given by
Bhattolpala captured my attention. It is an example stated,
while discussing the sloka 'Tatkala Indu Sahito', for the
determination of delivery/birth time from the time of
conception I am discussing the same below for the benefit of
all. The sloka ofBrihat Jataka under discussion is as follows-
